REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF JELSO, TONI
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FROM JUL-15-2019 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON APR-30-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JELSO, TONI AS TO DEFENDANT KELLEY, PAMELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF PAMELA KELLEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TONI JELSO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. THE LITIGATES INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE PLAINTIFF IN THIS CASE HAS A CASE AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT CSM-18-859380. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II DECIEDED TO HEAR BOTH MATTERS TOGETHER AT THIS HEARING. THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON THE CONTINGENT THAT THE DEFENDANT (PLAINTIFF IN CSM-19-860317) MUST PROVIDE THE COURT WITH HER EMAILS TODAY, APR-30-2019. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
